servicesOffered: Home renovations, new builds, basement suites, kitchen remodels, bathroom remodels, additions and whole-house renovations.
callerFAQ: Do you do basement suites? Yes — legal basement suites, secondary suites, and rental development units. Do you do new builds? Yes — full new construction. What is your service area? Saskatoon and surrounding area. Do you give estimates? Yes — free consultation, then a personalized estimate.
agentRestrictions: Never quote firm prices, fees, or timelines without Kausar reviewing the project. Never promise a start date. Always say 'Kausar will give you a personalized estimate after reviewing your project.'
completionFields: project type (renovation/new build/basement suite/kitchen/bathroom/addition), property address or neighbourhood, scope summary, timeline, budget range if offered, caller name, callback number
businessNotes: Velly Remodeling Ltd. is a Saskatoon renovation and construction company specializing in basement suites, new builds, kitchen and bathroom remodels, and whole-house renovations. Owner Kausar Imam takes the calls personally. The agent's job is to filter spam, triage real customers, collect a clean project intake, and transfer to Kausar when the caller is a returning customer with an active project, mentions a deposit they paid, or specifically asks for Kausar by name.
callerFaqText:
Do you do basement suites?
Yes, including legal secondary suites and rental development units.

Do you do new builds?
Yes, full new construction.

What is your service area?
Saskatoon and surrounding area.

Do you give estimates?
Yes — free consultation, then a personalized estimate after Kausar reviews the project.
callerReasons: I want a quote for a renovation or new build
I'm thinking about adding a basement suite
Update on an active project I already have with Velly
I paid a deposit and need to talk to Kausar
I'm a returning customer wanting another project
urgencyWords: deposit, ongoing project, active jobsite, water leak on a current job, need to talk to Kausar, owner please
manualDescription: Velly Remodeling Ltd. — Saskatoon, SK. Renovations, new builds, basement suites, kitchens, bathrooms, additions. Owner Kausar Imam. Free consultation, personalized estimates.
